commands.review_summary:
The PR adds optional package artifact inputs to the reusable package publish workflow, downloads a caller-uploaded `.tgz`, extracts it for validation, and points the publish command at the archive.

Reproducibility: yes. for the functional blocker from source inspection: default artifact mode points the CLI at a local `.tgz` while only adding `--source-ref`, and the CLI requires `--source-repo` plus `--source-commit` source metadata.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The PR needs contributor proof plus maintainer review of the publish-job trust boundary; ClawSweeper repair should not be requested while the real behavior proof gate is missing.

target.title: feat: support prebuilt package publish artifacts
target.body:
## Summary
- add optional prebuilt ClawPack artifact inputs to the reusable `package-publish.yml` workflow
- download and resolve the caller-uploaded `.tgz`, extract it for `clawhub package validate`, then publish the `.tgz` through the existing CLI path
- reject `source_path` with artifact mode so callers do not mix source-folder and prepacked publish semantics

## Tests
- `bunx vitest run src/__tests__/package-publish-workflow.test.ts`
- `bun run ci:static`
target.author: patrick-erichsen
